When I told her she was late, she did not listen and began talking in a disrespectful way. She said she would only do chores in her own way and time. Instead of listening, she started distracting others and refused to cooperate.

She shouted loudly in front of everyone, saying that I cannot do anything to her. She also said that she was a student last year, so I should stop telling her what to do. She pointed her hand at me in a challenging way, as if she wanted to fight. When I told her to be quiet, she continued speaking in Somali words that I could still hear.

This behavior was clear disrespect, dishonesty, and refusal to follow instructions.
